project_name: StudioMix - Dinámica Día de las Madres

layout_strategy.grid_system: CSS Grid (Bento style for features) & Flexbox (Layouts)

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);

navbar.style: Glassmorphism sticky top, logo placeholder (StudioMix), Links: Home, Indicaciones, Plantilla, Registro
navbar.mobile: Hamburger menu with smooth fade-in overlay

hero.style: Split layout or Centered. Big Typography 'DÍCELO CON AMOR A MAMÁ'. Background image with soft overlay.

instructions.style: 2-Column Grid. Left: Big Number steps (1, 2, 3). Right: Descriptive text with icons.
instructions.icons: Use SVG icons inline for: Select, Write, Share

template_carousel.style: Horizontal scroll snap. Each item is a card preview. Active state scales up (scale: 1.05).
template_carousel.interaction: Click to select template. Update 'Active Template' state.

card_editor.layout: Flex wrap. Left: Live Preview (The selected image + Overlay Text). Right: Textarea input + Controls.

js_logic: Live DOM manipulation to update the preview card text
html2canvas function to capture the '#card-preview' div
Web Share API implementation with fallback to simple download

instructions_to_main_agent: Create a SINGLE file named 'index.html' in /app.
Embed all CSS in <style> tags and all JS in <script> tags at the end of body.
The 'Card Preview' must be a specific DIV with position:relative. The background image is the selected template. The text is absolute positioned over it.
When 'Generar Imagen' is clicked, use html2canvas to capture ONLY that div.
Add a 'loading' state during image generation.
Do NOT use any other frameworks (No React, No Tailwind - write raw CSS).
Use CSS Variables for colors to make it easy to tweak.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons and inputs.
